channel.title: Beat the Scam
channel.description: Scam alerts, plain-English checks, and practical guides to help people verify suspicious emails, texts, websites, calls, and offers.

item.title: Is This Website a Scam? A Practical Checklist Before You Buy
item.description: A plain-English checklist for judging whether a website is legitimate before you enter payment details.

item.title: Royal Mail Text Scam Guide: How to Spot the Common Delivery Message Trap
item.description: How fake parcel delivery texts work, what signs to check, and what to do if you clicked the link.

item.title: PayPal Email Scam Signs: How to Check a Message Without Panicking
item.description: A checklist for reviewing suspicious PayPal emails and deciding whether a message is genuine.

item.title: Bank Transfer Scam Warning Signs Before You Send Money
item.description: Why fraudsters push bank transfers and what to check before sending funds to a person or business.

item.title: Crypto Investment Scam Checklist: Fast Tests Before You Deposit
item.description: A practical list of checks for judging high-return crypto offers, trading groups, and recovery services.

item.title: Phone Call Scam Red Flags: What to Listen For Before You Trust the Caller
item.description: How to handle suspicious calls claiming to be from banks, government bodies, couriers, or tech support.

item.title: Facebook Marketplace Scam Signs Before You Buy, Sell, or Ship
item.description: A practical guide to spotting common Marketplace fraud patterns for both buyers and sellers.

item.title: Romance Scam Slow-Burn Patterns: Why Long Conversations Still End in Fraud
item.description: How trust-building romance scams develop over time and the signs to notice before money is requested.

item.title: Job Scam Checklist UK: Warning Signs Before You Share Documents or Pay Fees
item.description: How to assess suspicious job offers, recruiter messages, and work-from-home opportunities in the UK.

item.title: Google Voice Verification Scam: Why a 'Simple Code' Can Still Be a Problem
item.description: How verification-code scams work on marketplaces and why you should never hand over one-time codes to strangers.

item.title: HMRC Tax Refund Scam Checklist: Fast Checks for Emails, Texts, and Calls
item.description: How to review messages claiming you are due a tax refund or owe HMRC money.

item.title: Evri Delivery Scam Guide: What to Check Before You Tap the Tracking Link
item.description: Common signs of fake parcel messages using the Evri name and what to do if you clicked.

item.title: Puppy Sale Scam Checklist: Warning Signs Before You Pay a Deposit
item.description: How to assess suspicious puppy adverts, breeder claims, shipping stories, and deposit requests.

item.title: WhatsApp Family Emergency Scam: How to Check the 'New Number' Message
item.description: How impersonation scams work when someone claims to be your child, partner, or relative from a new phone.

item.title: Travel Booking Scam Checklist: Hotels, Holiday Lets, and Fake Confirmation Emails
item.description: What to check before paying for accommodation or travel bookings through unfamiliar sites or messages.

item.title: Ticket Resale Scam Checklist: Concert and Event Warning Signs Before You Pay
item.description: How to review ticket resale offers on social media, messaging apps, and listing platforms.

item.title: Invoice Redirection Scam Checklist: How to Check Payment Detail Changes
item.description: A guide for spotting fake invoice updates and altered bank details in supplier communications.

item.title: Refund Recovery Scam Warning Signs After You Have Already Been Scammed
item.description: How follow-on recovery scams target previous victims with promises of refunds, tracing, or legal help.

item.title: QR Code Payment Scam Guide: What to Check Before You Scan
item.description: How malicious or substituted QR codes are used in parking, payments, and public-place scams.

item.title: Charity Donation Scam Checklist: How to Verify Appeals Before You Give
item.description: How to assess urgent donation appeals, cloned fundraising pages, and impersonated charity campaigns.

item.title: Amazon Order Scam Email Checklist: Fast Checks Before You Click
item.description: How to review suspicious Amazon order, refund, and account emails safely.
